HGSS.567.0000:
Have you met the maniac in this city?\f
He’s always bragging about his
rare Pokémon.
HGSS.567.0001:
You can’t help showing off the Pokémon
you have, don’t you agree?\f
I’d love to show mine to a friend of mine
who lives in Violet...
HGSS.567.0002:
The Pokémon at this Gym are all rough
and tough.\f
They could blow me away in a second.\r
Let me give you a piece of advice.\f
The Gym Leader uses Fighting-type
Pokémon.\f
You can try to fool them with
Psychic-type Pokémon.\f
Or simply defeat them before they
can demonstrate their power.\f
By the way, Chuck, the Gym Leader,
is into his waterfall training.\f
He won’t be able to hear you unless
you somehow stop the pounding water.
HGSS.567.0003:
[0103,0000,0000]! You won, didn’t you?
Your face tells me you did.
HGSS.567.0004:
Huh? Do you happen to...
have only one Pokémon?\f
That must be hard on you.
...\f
That’s right!
I’ll give you a TENTACOOL!\f
I just caught a little too many.
I was going to release it,\r
so take it. Go ahead!\f
HGSS.567.0006:
Want to give a nickname to
the TENTACOOL? [0200,0000]
